root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as date_of_birth, pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as retire_date , pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, localtimestamp) as age_mem , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as approve_date, substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),1,30) as age_mem_text , coalesce( ( select sum( principal_balance ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) , 0 ) as loan_balance
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) = ( select end_date + interval '1 day' from sc_lon_m_close_year where lon_year = '!lon_year_1!') order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
